title: SCP-207, Cola Bottle
description: SCP-207 offers great power at a deadly cost, drink it wisely.
body:
Cola Bottles adds a new item. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-207, also known as Cola Bottles.


SCP-207 can rarely be dropped by humanoid monsters such as zombies, pillagers, or piglins. This anomalous drink carries both incredible benefits and severe drawbacks. Bottles can be placed as decorative blocks or shattered to act as a weapon. The true danger, however, comes from drinking it. Consuming SCP-207 grants players extreme speed, haste, and jump boost for one minute, accompanied by the sound of a racing heartbeat. But drinking instantly removes two hearts, and after one minute, nausea and wither effects take over, while this anomalous drink consumes the players body...safely to the overworld.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where can I find SCP-207?

SCP-207 can be dropped with 0.8% chance when killing a humanoid mob like Zombies, Illagers, Piglins or Villagers.

</details>



![SCP-207](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/759c4f88401b008fabd38ac938f334d5bf6dc912.png)

SCP-207 appears as an ordinary cola bottle that can be dropped with 0.8% from killing humanoid mobs like Zombies, Villagers, Illagers or Piglins. When consumed, it grants extreme speed, haste and jump boost, but always at a cost to one full heart while the sound of a heartbeat can be heard. After One minute, those effects will vanish and the player will suffer from nausea and intense wither effects, while the liquid consumes the body. If right clicking a block with SCP-207 in the hand, will place it down and can be stacked up to four bottles, just like sea pickles or candles. Right clicking a block while sneaking will smash the Bottle which can be used as a weapon which deals a lot of damage.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
